title: mserver5 SIGSEGV, segmentation fault when big table join with other table.
poc: CREATE TABLE ODS_AGENT (C_CHA_CDE text not null, PK_AGENT text primary key);
select * from ods_ply_base left join (select * from ods_agent  where business_end_date > now()) as bb on c_cmpny_agt_cde=bb.c_cha_cde;
key_bug_features: segmentation fault on large table join operation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ODS_PLY_BASE (C_PLY_NO text, C_VALUE int, C_DATE date);
CREATE TABLE ODS_AGENT (C_CHA_CDE text not null, PK_AGENT text primary key, C_BUSINESS_END_DATE timestamp);
INSERT INTO ODS_PLY_BASE (C_PLY_NO, C_VALUE, C_DATE) VALUES ('PLY001', 100, '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO ODS_AGENT (C_CHA_CDE, PK_AGENT, C_BUSINESS_END_DATE) VALUES ('CHA001', 'AGENT001', '2023-12-31 23:59:59');
SELECT * FROM ODS_PLY_BASE LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM ODS_AGENT WHERE C_BUSINESS_END_DATE > NOW()) AS bb ON C_PLY_NO = bb.C_CHA_CDE;
